subject: Update policy/distribution config
commit_message:
Update policy/distribution config

Updating the config file of distribution chart as per the new code
changes done in El Alto release.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1892
Change-Id: I516bdb3306b88ecd123f6340ae1afe28e4a96eac
Signed-off-by: ramverma <ram.krishna.verma@est.tech>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Ram, when you have a chance cherry pick these changes to "staging" branch, that's what integration is using for their test installs, that's going to be probably merged much earlier.   I think then we can have these changes plus the new released version changes into master once we have new images ready.

Abandoned

Moved the changes to staging branch. Once the new docker image is ready the changes will be brought to master along with pointing to new image.
